'''Vrox''' was the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] before the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was a secret supporter of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] while he was still a [[Senator/Legends|senator]], and comments by [[Fenn Shysa]] could be interpreted that Vrox was aware of his dual nature as a Senator and [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]. Some time before the Clone Wars began, Vrox authorized a series of raids by the on nearby systems to plunder them of valuables and riches. When a [[Republican Army]] task force, aided by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] troops, attempted to bring his raids to an end, Vrox ordered his forces to engage the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] army with little concern for civilian casualties, in fact ordering his own forces to use siege weapons to kill the forces in the Mandalorian capital city. The ensuing [[Battle of Mandalore (pre-Naboo)|Battle of Mandalore]] was bloody and concluded with the near annihilation of the Mandalorian forces and the capture of Vrox.
